tagline: A purpose-driven senior care franchise with three revenue streams and sub-$150K entry for mission-aligned owner-operators.
description_short: Always Best Care is an owner-operated senior care franchise delivering non-medical in-home care, assisted living referrals, and skilled home health services through a single-territory model with under $150K to enter. With 275 active territories, systemwide revenue growing 17.9% in 2024, and a 19-year proven system, it targets mission-driven executives seeking recession-resistant recurring revenue in America's fastest-growing demographic.
market_intelligence_insight: U.S. home healthcare market was valued at $100.95B in 2024 and is projected to reach $176.30B by 2032 at a 7.4% CAGR; over 10,000 Americans turn 65 daily and 88% of seniors prefer to age at home, driving sustained structural demand for in-home care services.
item_19_headline: Systemwide revenue grew 17.9% in 2024 to $280.9M across 107 franchised businesses, with top multi-unit operators exceeding $10M annually.
ongoing_support: field visits, ABCUniverse proprietary platform, area representative coaching, national conferences, marketing campaigns, proprietary scheduling software, remote patient monitoring tools
